item.description: The action continues through holes 19–21, featuring cave-themed challenges, creative obstacles, and friendly competition on the course.

item.title: The One In a Million Mini Golf Hole In One!
item.description: A mini golf moment captures a well-timed shot that results in a hole-in-one, highlighting skill, luck, and a fun course experience.
